audit_items.proof_trace: The only error path in __damon_dbgfs_init is when kmalloc_array fails (L1044); on this path, debugfs_remove(dbgfs_root) is called (L1046), which recursively removes all child debugfs entries created by the loop and dbgfs_fill_ctx_dir (recursive behavior guaranteed since Linux 5.10, predating DAMON's 5.15 introduction). The failed kmalloc_array itself returned NULL so there is no heap memory to free. On the success path, dbgfs_dirs[0] = dbgfs_root constitutes an ownership transfer.
